x-enumeration-literals.name: Incentive Credit Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description:
What it records:
Addition of earned incentives
Credit type (cashback, points, bonus)
Credit amount or quantity
Timestamp and reference

Comment:
Example:+5,000 reward points earned from card spending

x-enumeration-literals.name: Monetary Credit Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description:
What it records:
Monetary amount credited to a financial account
Target product (current account, savings, credit card)
Value date and amount

Comment:
Example: +2,000 USD salary credited to current account

x-enumeration-literals.name: Interest Credit Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description:
What it records:
Interest earned on deposit or product
Interest rate applied
Calculation period

Comment:
Example: +25 USD monthly savings interest credited

x-enumeration-literals.name: Loan Disbursement Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description:
What it records:
Release of approved loan funds
Loan account reference
Disbursement amount

Comment:
Example: +10,000 USD personal loan disbursed to customer account

x-enumeration-literals.name: Bonus / Promotional Credit Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description:
What it records:
Additional promotional incentive
Campaign reference
Bonus calculation applied

Comment:
Example: +1,000 bonus points awarded under festive campaign

x-enumeration-literals.name: Adjustment / Correction Credit Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description:
What it records:
Manual or system correction
Reason for adjustment
Linked original transaction reference

Comment:
Example: +50 USD credited due to billing error correction

x-enumeration-literals.name: Disbursement Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that releases credit funds from the lender to the borrower, initiating or increasing the credit exposure.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Reversal Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description:
What it records:
Reversal of previously posted credit
Reduction of incentive or monetary value
Reference to original credit transaction

Comment:
Example: 5,000 reward points reversed due to refunded purchase

x-enumeration-literals.name: Utilization Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action where the borrower uses available credit (e.g., drawing from a credit line or making a purchase on credit).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Repayment Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action where the borrower pays back part or all of the outstanding credit, reducing the liability.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Prepayment Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action where the borrower repays credit earlier than scheduled, either partially or in full.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Interest Accrual Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that calculates and adds interest to the outstanding credit balance over time.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Interest Payment Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that settles accrued interest, either separately or as part of a repayment.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Fee Charge Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that applies service-related fees (e.g., processing, maintenance) to the credit account.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Penalty Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that applies charges due to non-compliance, such as late payment or breach of terms.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Adjustment Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that modifies balances or entries to correct errors or reflect updates.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Reversal Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that cancels or reverses a previous transaction, restoring the prior state.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Write-off Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that removes uncollectible credit amounts from active accounting records.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Restructuring Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that alters the structure of the credit obligation, such as capitalizing interest or changing repayment terms.
